title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
